title: Opening for Real Estate Agent at DLF Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Opening for Real Estate Agent at DLF Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
DLF Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Real Estate Agent to join our dynamic team in Faridabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About DLF Consulting Pvt Ltd:
DLF Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DLF Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
